en: Rui is the Lower Rank Five of the Twelve Kizuki.
He lives deep inside the dark spider mountain.
His threads cut steel and never break easily.
Rui wants a real family who truly loves him.
The cold mountain always smells of fear and webs.
Right now, Tanjiro is climbing the dark mountain.
Spider threads are falling from the tall trees.
Rui is pulling the strings to control the demons.
Nezuko is protecting her brother from the webs.
Giyu is coming to help the young slayers now.
After Rui died, Muzan became very angry.
He called the Lower Moons to a secret meeting.
Muzan destroyed the weak demons one by one.
Kamanue told Muzan that he had a plan.
The other demons felt great fear that night.
Kamanue was standing in the dark room.
The demons were waiting nervously for Muzan.
While he was talking, he was thinking of escape.
Muzan was watching them with cold eyes.
They were trembling while their master spoke.
I will catch more humans for you, Mukago begged.
What will you do for me? Muzan asked coldly.
You are not going to serve me anymore.
Tanjiro is going to learn stronger techniques.
One day I will defeat every demon, he said.
I can become stronger, Mukago said with fear.
She could feel her own death coming closer.
Tanjiro can already use Water Breathing well.
When he was weak, he could not cut the rock.
Could you teach me more, master? he asked.
Wakuraba was faster than the other Lower Moons.
Muzan was stronger than any demon alive.
The Upper Moons are more powerful than the Lower Moons.
Escaping was harder than fighting the king.
Fear made the night darker than before.
Muzan is the strongest demon in the world.
Wakuraba was the fastest of the Lower Moons.
That was the most terrible meeting of all.
Kokushibo is the oldest of the Upper Moons.
Tanjiro trained with the bravest heart of all.
Rokuro has served Muzan for many years.
I have killed hundreds of humans, he said.
You have never defeated a Hashira, Muzan replied.
The Lower Moons have already lost Muzan's trust.
Tanjiro has grown stronger since the spider mountain.
A demon must obey the king, Muzan said.
You should not question my orders.
Slayers must protect humans with their lives.
You have to be useful, or you will die.
A warrior should never stop training.
Enmu wanted to please Muzan more than anyone.
He used his power to make people fall asleep.
Tanjiro tried to wake up from the dream.
To escape a dream, you must cut your own neck.
The slayers needed to protect the passengers.
Sleeping deeply was the demon's clever trap.
Enmu enjoyed eating people's happy dreams.
Tanjiro kept fighting without giving up.
Waking up was the only way to survive.
They stopped the demon by working together.
Many people were taken by the demon Daki.
The district was protected by four brave slayers.
Both heads must be cut at the same time.
Gyutaro was hidden inside his sister's body.
The demons were finally defeated by the team.
Tengen is the Hashira who led the mission.
The demon that attacked the city was cruel.
Daki used sashes which could crush buildings.
Gyutaro was the brother whose hatred made him strong.
The slayers who never gave up finally won.
Gyokko was strange and cruel, but he was powerful.
He could hide in a pot or travel through water.
The village was quiet, so the attack shocked everyone.
Muichiro was young, and he fought without fear.
The demon could win, or he could fall to the blade.
Although Gyokko was an Upper Moon, Muichiro was not afraid.
Because the smiths were in danger, Muichiro rushed to help.
When the demon attacked, the smiths ran for safety.
Muichiro kept fighting even though he was tired.
The village survived because the slayers never gave up.
If we find the real body, we will win.
If you cut a clone, it will only multiply.
The demon will escape if the sun does not rise.
If Nezuko helps us, we will have a chance.
If we work together, we will protect the village.
Hantengu is hard to kill, isn't he?
We can find the real body, can't we?
You won't give up, will you?
Mitsuri is very strong, isn't she?
They fought bravely until dawn, didn't they?
If I were stronger, I would have saved Rengoku.
If Akaza were human, he would not be so cruel.
If we had more time, we would heal our wounds.
If I were you, I would never become a demon.
If the sun rose now, the demon would burn.
Tanjiro wondered why Akaza had become a demon.
Do you know how we can defeat him?
Nobody knew where Akaza kept his memories.
Can you tell me what he fears most?
They asked when the next attack would come.
Doma was the Upper Rank Two of the Twelve Kizuki.
Many lonely people were tricked by his smile.
Shinobu has hated Doma for many years.
Her older sister was killed by this demon.
Shinobu made a deadly poison from wisteria.
The poison was hidden inside her own body.
Kanao and Inosuke have trained for this battle.
Doma was finally defeated by the two fighters.
He had never understood human feelings.
The victims have never been forgotten.
Kokushibo was the warrior who became Upper One.
The sword which he carried was almost unbreakable.
He was very old, but his will never weakened.
Because his power was huge, four slayers fought together.
If we attack as one, we will break his guard.
Gyomei, whose strength was greatest, led the attack.
Although they were wounded, they did not retreat.
If I were faster, I could land the final blow.
Genya fought hard, so the others gained time.
The demon that feared death finally fell at dawn.
Muzan is the demon king who created all demons.
For a thousand years, he has feared only sunlight.
Long ago, he was an ordinary, sick man.
The slayers were fighting him while the sky grew light.
Many brave heroes were killed by Muzan that night.
We must hold him until dawn, the Hashira said.
If the sun rises, he will turn to ashes.
If we gave up now, the world would fall.
At last the sun rose, and Muzan could not escape.
Peace has returned to the world, hasn't it?
